patches_modified.name: Fix "Restore Comment"
patches_modified.description: Fixes the "Restore Comment" feature (requires Sync Ultra) by fetching from an alternative API. Also includes UI changes to make this feature more accessible.

patches_modified.name: Disable dynamic app icon
patches_modified.description: Prevents Duolingo from changing the app icon. Only the default icon will be available.

patches_modified.name: Enable Premium
patches_modified.description: Enables app features locked behind the subscription paywall.

patches_modified.name: Enable debug mode
patches_modified.description: Enables hidden debug menu in settings.

patches_modified.description: Prevents Duolingo from changing the app icon. Only the default icon will be available.

patches_modified.description: Enables app features locked behind the subscription paywall.

patches_modified.name: Enable debug mode
patches_modified.description: Enables hidden debug menu in settings.

patches_modified.name: Enable Pro JS
patches_modified.description: Patches the JS bundle to bypass Seedlang's membership gates for pro.

patches_modified.name: Unlock PRO
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Battery Guru's PRO and removes the ads. PRO is decided on the device, so the deep sleep stats, charge history, themes, and the ad-free view all open up.

patches_added.name: SponsorBlock
patches_added.description: Adds options to enable and configure SponsorBlock, which can skip non-music segments.
